_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of principles and methods for showing, promoting, and selling products or services. This includes marketing strategy and tactics, product demonstration, sales techniques, and sales control systems.
comments: Sales and marketing is outside WIDAI scope. While data products have go-to-market considerations, WIDAI does not define sales/marketing competencies. No gap — intentionally out of scope.
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

strength_justification.methodology: No computational scoring — element determined out of WIDAI scope during semantic analysis
